events.title: Spring Musical: The Wizard of Oz
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description: Woodside High Drama Department presents The Wizard of Oz. Tickets: $15 Adults, $10 Students/Seniors, Children under 5 Free. Purchase at woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime.
